idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 2.1.2

First-run welcome notification showing your format shortcuts and a link to the settings.

Friendlier message when Flutter is downloading a fresh Dart SDK before dart_format can start.

Diagnostics page now also lists the dart_format log; bug reports include it plus the dart_format process id.

Plugin log files are now self-managing (rotate when large, prune when old).

Version 2.0.38

Formatting runs in a cancelable progress dialog with a file count, so the IDE no longer freezes on large files or big multi-file runs.

Auto-recovery after a Dart SDK upgrade: the plugin re-activates dart_format and retries automatically instead of breaking.

Newer dart_format versions on pub.dev now install immediately instead of waiting for the next IDE start.

Disabling or updating the plugin no longer leaves a stray dart_format process behind.

Version 2.0.36

Linux/macOS: dart / flutter on PATH via ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc is now picked up when starting dart_format.

Error notifications now show the path to the plugin log file, and the settings page has a new Diagnostics section with quick links to it.

Version 2.0.35

Improved handling of unexpected dart_format process exit during startup.

Version 2.0.32

Added new shortcut Ctrl/Command+Alt+L.
"Fix spaces" is no longer experimental.

Version 2.0.23
Better error reporting when Dart executable not found.

Version 2.0.21
Updated IntelliJ compatibility.

Version 2.0.20
Fixed startup problems on Windows.

Version 2.0.19
Added "Fix spaces" (experimental).

Version 2.0.18
Fixed startup problems on Linux/macOS.

Version 2.0.17
Now installs and updates the dart_format package automatically.

Version 2.0.16
Fixed UTF-8 handling. Better notifications.

Version 2.0.15
Fixed startup problems on Linux/macOS and better notifications.

Version 2.0.9
Fixed issue with temp dir for Linux/macOS.

Version 2.0.8
Fixed compatibility issue with JetBrains.

Version 2.0.7
Added "open warning/error location" to notification when location is available.

Version 2.0.6
Fixed path to external dart_format for Linux/macOS.

Version 2.0.5
Better installation instructions for the dart_format package.
Added version check for the dart_format package.
Better error reporting.

Version 2.0.4
Better error logging and reporting.

Version 2.0.0
Complete rewrite of the plugin. Now uses the dart_format package on pub.dev.
idea-plugin.description:
A formatter for Dart.

Like dartfmt.
But better ;)
Because it's configurable.

To format the current file / the currently selected folders and files, press the following:
Ctrl/Command+Alt+, to format only Dart files
Ctrl/Command+Alt+L to format all file types*
* uses the built-in formatter for non-Dart files

This plugin:
Source code: DartFormatJetBrainsPlugin on GitHub
Problems and feature requests: GitHub Issues for DartFormatJetBrainsPlugin

External dart_format package:
Source code: dart_format on GitHub
Problems and feature requests: GitHub Issues for dart_format

Also available for Visual Studio Code:
DartFormat at the Visual Studio Marketplace
idea-plugin.name: DartFormat
